examples.title: SA Bundling Example
examples.description: This example demonstrates how to create a VPN connection using SA Bundling.
examples.code:
CREATE SA BUNDLE
ADD SA 1 (ENCRYPTION)
ADD SA 2 (AUTHENTICATION)
APPLY SA BUNDLE TO CONNECTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example creates a VPN connection using SA Bundling, where two SAs are combined into a single bundle and applied to the connection.

examples.title: SA Chaining Example
examples.description: This example demonstrates how to create a VPN connection using SA Chaining.
examples.code:
CREATE SA CHAIN
ADD SA 1 (ENCRYPTION)
ADD SA 2 (AUTHENTICATION)
APPLY SA CHAIN TO CONNECTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example creates a VPN connection using SA Chaining, where two SAs are applied in a specific order to the connection.
